_comment: Final report produced by OpenClaw after the Phase 7 demo task (demo-runbook.md §7). Matches the required demo behavior 6: concise final report after detecting final tx status.
task_prompt: Monitor vault status, verify the agent is authorized and funded, deposit exactly 100 USDC (100000000 in 6-decimal units) for order 0x1111...1111 when all preflight checks pass, then report the tx hash, deposit id, vault position (shares minted), and block number in a JSON object.
demo_behaviors_observed: 1. OpenClaw loaded robotmoney-cli skill and invoked rmpc for all chain reads
2. Agent ran get-vault, get-gateway, get-agent, get-balance, get-allowance, self-check before deposit
3. All preflight checks passed; agent proceeded to deposit
4. Successful guarded deposit on fork (AgentDeposit event emitted, status=confirmed)
5. Agent recorded tx hash, deposit id, vault position (shares minted), and block number
6. Agent produced concise final report after confirming tx status via rmpc status
